sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 3Q2025 매출 +3.2%, 조정 EPS 3.59달러로 견조 성장, 연간 가이던스 상향

keyPoints.text: 3분기 연결 순매출은 3.2% 증가한 63억 5,800만 달러(6,358.2백만 달러)를 기록했으며, Paint Stores Group의 동일점 기준 매출은 3.6% 성장했다.
희석 EPS는 5.3% 증가한 3.35달러, 조정 희석 EPS는 6.5% 상승한 3.59달러를 기록했으며, 순이익은 3.3% 증가한 8억 3,310만 달러(매출 대비 13.1%)였다.
조정 EBITDA는 6.0% 증가한 13억 6,000만 달러(매출 대비 21.4%)를 기록했으며, 분기 주주 환원은 8억 6,400만 달러였다.

riskChanges.text: Consumer Brands Group 매출은 예상보다 양호했지만 여전히 도전적인 환경을 이어갔으며, 코어 수요(북미 DIY 제외 패키징·자동차 정비 이외)는 전반적으로 부진했다.

businessChanges.text: Paint Stores Group은 모든 최종 시장에서 매출이 성장했으며, 보호·해양 코팅, 주거 재도장, 상업 부문이 주도했고 세그먼트 마진이 확대됐다.
Performance Coatings Group은 패키징과 자동차 정비(Automotive Refinish) 부문 성장으로 전체 매출이 증가했고, 조정 세그먼트 마진은 목표 범위를 유지했다.
연간 SG&A 성장이 저 한 자릿수 수준으로 모더레이션됐으며, 조정 EBITDA 마진 및 조정 EPS 모두 전년 대비 개선됐다.

financialHighlights.text: 세전이익 10억 6,000만 달러(1,060.5백만 달러, 매출 대비 16.7%), 전년 10억 2,200만 달러(1,022.8백만 달러) 대비 3.7% 증가.
연간 조정 희석 EPS 가이던스를 11.25~11.45달러로 조정(기존 가이던스에서 좁혀진 범위).

watchItems.text: 연간 가이던스 범위를 좁힌 것은 실적 가시성이 높아졌음을 시사하며, 수요 회복 여부가 연말 실적 달성의 핵심 변수다.
Consumer Brands Group의 수요 회복 시기와 패키징·자동차 정비 외 코어 시장 개선 여부가 향후 사업부 마진 방향을 결정할 것이다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 shwearningsrelease3q2025.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 NEWS The Sherwin-Williams Company • 101 W. Prospect Avenue • Cleveland, Ohio 44115 • (216) 566-2000 The Sherwin-Williams Company Reports 2025 Third Quarter Financial Results CLEVELAND, October 28, 2025 - The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE: SHW) announced its financial results for the third quarter ended September 30, 2025. All comparisons are to the third quarter of the prior year, unless otherwise noted. SUMMARY • Consolidated Net sales increased 3.2% to $6.36 billion in the quarter ◦ Net sales from stores in the Paint Stores Group open more than twelve calendar months increased 3.6% in the quarter • Diluted net income per share increased 5.3% to $3.35 per share in the quarter compared to $3.18 per share in the third quarter of 2024 ◦ Adjusted diluted net income per share increased 6.5% to $3.59  Normalized numeric aliases: $6.36 billion = 63억 6,000만 달러; $6.36 = 6.36달러; $3.35 = 3.35달러; $3.18 = 3.18달러; $3.59 = 3.59달러.

compared to $3.37 per share in the third quarter of 2024 • Net income increased 3.3% in the quarter to $833.1 million or 13.1% of Net sales • Adjusted Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation and Amortization (Adjusted EBITDA) in the quarter increased 6.0% to $1.36 billion, or 21.4% of Net sales • Narrowing full year 2025 diluted net income per share guidance in the range of $10.16 to $10.36 per share, including acquisition-related amortization expense of $0.77 per share and severance and other restructuring expenses of $0.32 per share ◦ Narrowing full year 2025 adjusted diluted net income per share guidance in the range of $11.25 to $11.45 per share CEO REMARKS “Sherwin-Williams delivered solid third quarter results, as we continued to  Normalized numeric aliases: $833.1 million = 8억 3,310만 달러; $1.36 billion = 13억 6,000만 달러; $3.37 = 3.37달러; $833.1 = 833.1달러; $1.36 = 1.36달러; $10.16 = 10.16달러; $10.36 = 10.36달러; $0.77 = 0.77달러; $11.25 = 11.25달러; $0.32 = 0.32달러; $11.45 = 11.45달러.

Officer, Heidi G. Petz. “Throughout the quarter, we continued to serve our customers, invest for success, control our costs, take advantage of a unique competitive environment, and execute on our enterprise priorities. “On a year-over-year basis, consolidated sales increased at the high-end of our guided range. Gross margin expanded, and SG&A growth moderated to the low single-digit percentage level as we expected, inclusive of targeted growth investments, restructuring costs, and new building costs. We grew adjusted EBITDA margin and adjusted diluted earnings per share while returning $864 million to shareholders through share repurchases and dividends during the quarter. “Paint Stores Group sales grew in every end market, led by protective and marine, residential repaint and commercial, and segment margin expanded. Consumer Brands Group sales remained challenging but were better  Normalized numeric aliases: $864 million = 8억 6,400만 달러; $864 = 864달러.

than expected, and adjusted segment margin expanded. Performance Coatings Group sales grew driven by Packaging and Automotive Refinish, with adjusted segment margin remaining in our targeted range.” 1 THIRD QUARTER CONSOLIDATED RESULTS (in millions, except per share data) Three Months Ended September 30, 2025 2024 $ Change % Change Net sales $ 6,358.2 $ 6,162.5 $ 195.7 3.2 % Income before income taxes $ 1,060.5 $ 1,022.8 $ 37.7 3.7 % As a percent of Net sales 16.7% 16.6% Net income per share - diluted $ 3.35 $ 3.18 $ 0.17 5.3 % Adjusted net income per share - diluted $ 3.59 $ 3.37 $ 0.22 6.5 % Consolidated Net sales increased primarily  Normalized numeric aliases: $6,358.2 = 6,358.2달러; $6,162.5 = 6,162.5달러; $195.7 = 195.7달러; $1,060.5 = 1,060.5달러; $1,022.8 = 1,022.8달러; $37.7 = 37.7달러; $3.35 = 3.35달러; $3.18 = 3.18달러; $3.59 = 3.59달러; 1,060 million = 10억 6,000만 달러; $3.37 = 3.37달러; $0.22 = 0.22달러; 6,358 million = 63억 5,800만 달러; 6,162 million = 61억 6,200만 달러; 1,022 million = 10억 2,200만 달러.
